channel.title: SPL - International District/Chinatown Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - International District/Chinatown Branch

item.title: Family CRAFT-ernoon
item.description:
Wednesday, April 1, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: International District/Chinatown Branch, Study Room

Families are invited to join us in making simple crafts.

Event details

item.title: 普通话故事会 / 國語故事會
item.description:
Saturday, April 4, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: International District/Chinatown Branch, Children's Area / 儿童区域 / 兒童區域

在故事会，各年龄层的孩子（从0岁到小学生）和他们的家庭都可以一起享受故事、歌曲和有趣的学习活动。 活动使用普通话进行。------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------在故事會，各年齡層的孩子（從0歲到小學生）和他們的家庭都可以一起享受故事、歌曲和有趣的學習活動。 活動使用國語進行。

Event details

item.title: Coffee & Conversations
item.description:
Monday, April 6, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: International District/Chinatown Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a snack, some coffee or tea, and to chat with your neighbors!

Event details
